name: ExtensionSubstancePolymer_Modification
title: R5: Todo - this is intended to connect to a repeating full modification structure, also used by Protein and Nucleic Acid . String is just a placeholder (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SubstancePolymer.modification` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SubstancePolymer.modification` 0..1 `string`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `SubstancePolymer.modification` 0..1 `string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SubstancePolymer.modification` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubstancePolymer` is not mapped.
Element `SubstancePolymer.modification` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
